newsSince: Materially positive. On June 11 Entegris disclosed an EUV photoresist cross-licensing pact with JSR and Inpria that ends a patent challenge and aligns next-gen EUV materials, and a wave of analyst price-target hikes followed (Mizuho to $180 Outperform, plus Goldman Sachs, UBS and Deutsche Bank), driving a ~25% advance since June 9. Q2 FY26 results are due June 27 (guide $815-845M). HBM/advanced-packaging exposure (>$100M run-rate) reiterated as a growth driver.

sources.label: Timothy Sykes: Entegris climbs as analyst boost, EUV deal fire up AI chip story (Jun 18)
StocksToTrade: Entegris powers higher on EUV deal and target hike (Jun 11)
Entegris Q1 2026 earnings transcript (HBM/advanced packaging detail)
ENTG Mizuho hike + JSR/Inpria EUV deal (Jun 18)

verdicts.rankRationale: Genuinely new since June 9: a June 11 JSR/Inpria EUV cross-license removes a patent overhang and locks Entegris into next-gen AI-node photoresist materials, with broad analyst PT hikes. This strengthens the AI-fab/HBM materials bottleneck case the prior 'hold' lacked. Move up.
verdicts.bull: EUV materials cross-license + HBM slurry/advanced-packaging exposure entrench it in AI-node WFE upcycle; multiple PT raises.
verdicts.neutral: Strong setup but +87% YTD; Q2 print June 27 must confirm order acceleration.
verdicts.bear: ~25% pop in two weeks; leverage and capex-cycle risk if WFE upcycle stalls.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 FY26 results (Jun 27); EUV materials ramp; HBM packaging pull

verdicts.rankRationale: The EUV cross-license is real new picks-and-shovels evidence, lifting score. But this crowding-sensitive lens penalizes chase: ~25% in two weeks on a +87% YTD name consumes much of the under-owned residual, so the bottleneck-strengthening is offset by reduced asymmetry — net small positive, hold rank 19.
verdicts.bull: Materials purity + EUV/advanced-packaging consumables are scarce, sticky AI-node bottleneck exposure.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis improved but the easy alpha has been chased after the June rerating.
verdicts.bear: Crowding-sensitive list: buying after a 25% spike is exactly the chase this page discounts.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: EUV materials wins; advanced-packaging consumables share

verdicts.rankRationale: New EUV cross-license and analyst upgrades strengthen the upstream pick-and-shovel thesis on this master under-owned-bottleneck list, justifying a score bump vs the June 9 'hold'. The +87% YTD rerating tempers it, so a modest positive without a rank jump.
verdicts.bull: Sole/critical supplier of contamination-control and EUV materials to leading-edge AI fabs; durable franchise.
verdicts.neutral: Bottleneck is genuine but increasingly recognized as YTD rerates.
verdicts.bear: Under-owned residual eroding fast; leverage and pricing-execution watch items.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Leading-edge capacity adds; EUV materials adoption
verdicts.primaryRisk: Rerating reduces scarcity premium; contamination-control execution
